info.title: Forge AI Backend API
info.description: Forge AI is the Enterprise SDLC Agent Operating System. This OpenAPI spec covers the FastAPI backend mounted at `/api/v1`, plus the WebSocket routes mounted at the root. The live spec is regenerated from `backend/app/main.py`; this snapshot was generated by static AST extraction of route decorators because the runtime dependencies were not installed at generation time.

BearerAuth.description: OIDC-issued access token from the identity broker.
